input.hiring_signal_brief: Orinda AI Labs closed a $18,000,000 Series A on 2025-11-02. 9 open engineering roles posted — up 4 in the last 60 days. ML-specific roles: 5. Python roles: 4. Modern data stack detected: Ray, vLLM, Weights & Biases, Databricks.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted senior engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Available bench: ML (5), Python/Backend (6), Fullstack (4), Data (3). NestJS stack committed through Q3 2026 on Modo Compass engagement.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: hope this finds you well|circle back|touch base|synergy|leverage|best-in-class|reach out|loop you in|end-to-end|just wanted to

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

metadata.source_email_subject: quick note on your AI platform work
